chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No. S – 120 of 2024. Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1.For orders on M.A 1161/2024. 2.For orders on o/obj. at Flag.A. 3.For orders on M.A 1162/2024. 4.For Hearing of main case. 06.03.2024. Syed Naimat Ali Shah Advocate along with applicants - 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. At the very out-set, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicants that he will not press the disposal of instant criminal miscellaneous application u/s 561-A, Cr.P.C before this Court on merits provided the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of 05 days commencing from today in order to enable them to surrender before learned trial Court to seek condonation of their absence on last date of hearing. In view of above, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of five days from today subject to their furnishing surety in sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. The operation of NBWs, if is issued against the applicants by learned trial Court to remain suspended for the said period. Instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
